THE MATTER IS OFF CALENDAR PER EX PARTE ORDER FILED ON MAY 25, 2018. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR., CLERK: M.GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, TORREANOM@AOL.COM, REPORTED. (302/RBU)
ORDER RETURNING ADMINISTRATIVE RECORD

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER PETER REDKO, DPM'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 800 - PETITIONER PETER REDKO'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS IS DENIED. GOVERNMENT CODE 800 ALLOWS A MINIMAL ATTORNEY FEE AWARD (MAXIMUM: $7,500) IF A PUBLIC ENTITY ACTED IN A "WHOLLY ARBITRARY OR CAPRICIOUS" MANNER IN AN ADMINISTRATIVE PROCEEDING. (STIRLING V. AGRICULTURAL LABOR RELATIONS BD. (1987) 189 CAL.APP.3D 1305, 1312.) ATTORNEY FEES MAY NOT BE AWARDED IF THE ENTITY'S ACTION WAS "CLEARLY ERRONEOUS;" RATHER, THE ACTION MUST BE "NOT SUPPORTED BY A FAIR OR SUBSTANTIAL REASON, A STUBBORN INSISTENCE ON FOLLOWING UNAUTHORIZED CONDUCT, OR A BAD FAITH LEGAL DISPUTE." (ID.) I FIND THAT RESPONDENT'S ACTIONS HERE - MISREADING ITS AUTHORITY UNDER STATE LAW - WERE THE FORMER, NOT THE LATTER. ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR., CLERK: M.GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, TORREANOM@AOL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/RBU)

LAW AND MOTION 302, MOTION TO SETTLE ADMINISTRATIVE RECORDS. JUDGE KAHN HAS DETERMINED THAT THE CCP 170.6 PEREMPTORY CHALLENGE IS TIMELY AND HE WILL NOT BE HANDLING ANY FURTHER MATTERS IN THIS CASE. THE HEARING TO SETTLE THE ADMINISTRATIVE RECORD, IF NEEDED, WILL BE HEARD BY JUDGE RICHARD ULMER ON MAY 11, 2018 AT 9:30AM IN DEPARTMENT 302. COUNSEL FOR DR. REDKO IS REQUIRED TO SEND AN EMAIL TO CONTESTDEPT302TR@SFTC.ORG WITH A COPY TO ALL OTHER PARTIES BY 4PM ON MAY 10, 2018 STATING, WITHOUT ARGUMENT, WHETHER THE PARTIES HAVE AGREED ON THE ADMINISTRATIVE RECORD AND, IF NOT, WHAT THE DISAGREEMENTS ARE. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, TORREANOM@AOL.COM, REPORTED. (D302/HK)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Attorney Fees Petitioner Peter Redko, Dpm'S Motion For Attorney Fees And Costs Pursuant To Government Code Section 800
Off Calendar Sep-21-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Petitioner Peter Redko, Dpm'S Motion For Attorney Fees And Costs Pursuant To Government Code Section 800.

Petitioner Peter Redko's motion for attorney fees and costs is DENIED. Government Code 800 allows a minimal attorney fee award (maximum: $7,500) if a public entity acted in a "wholly arbitrary or capricious" manner in an administrative proceeding. (Stirling v. Agricultural Labor Relations Bd. (1987) 189 Cal.App.3d 1305, 1312.) Attorney fees may not be awarded if the entity's action was "clearly erroneous;" rather, the action must be "not supported by a fair or substantial reason, a stubborn insistence on following unauthorized conduct, or a bad faith legal dispute." (Id.) I find that respondent's actions here - misreading its authority under state law - were the former, not the latter.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

Motion To Settle Administrative Records
Off Calendar May-09-2018 Continued To May-11-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Motion To Settle Administrative Records.

Judge Kahn has determined that the CCP 170.6 peremptory challenge is timely and he will not be handling any further matters in this case. The hearing to settle the administrative record, if needed, will be heard by Judge Richard Ulmer on May 11, 2018 at 9:30am in department 302. Counsel for Dr. Redko is required to send an email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties by 4pm on May 10, 2018 stating, without argument, whether the parties have agreed on the administrative record and, if not, what the disagreements are.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/HK)
